titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Economics, Yale University, Records
Department of Economics, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday November 5, 2025 at 03:00

did.unittitle: Department of Economics, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of reports, correspondence, minutes, and memoranda documenting faculty appointments, committees, budgets, and students in the Yale Department of Economics and the Economic Growth Center. Also included are grade books of Professor Fred R. Fairchild, 1904-1945.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 14-B (YRG 14-B), Records of academic programs and departments of the Yale Faculty of Arts and Sciences.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Economics, Yale University, Records (RU 422). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of reports, correspondence, minutes, and memoranda documenting faculty appointments, committees, budgets, and students in the Yale Department of Economics and the Economic Growth Center. Also included are grade books of Professor Fred R. Fairchild, 1904-1945.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

did.unittitle: Chittenden, Russel H, Director, Sheffield Scientific School
Jones, Frederick S, Dean, Yale College

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 1 folder 6 (Personnel, Misc.) is restricted until January 1, 2035. The remaining accession is open for research.

did.unittitle: History, "Economics at Yale 1940-1990'' by Lloyd G. Reynolds, Biographical data of L.G.R.
Buckley book "God and Man at Yale'' (Yale News)

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at beinecke.library@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Triffin, Robert: Rebuttal to Altman, Gold Crisis
Szladits, Mrs. Charles (Lola): Curator, Berg Collection. New York Public Library

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at beinecke.library@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: AID (Agency for International Development) correspondence re contract
AID (Agency for International Development) Contract Reports
Econ 18a The American Economy in Perspective
Econ 18a The American Economy in Perspective
Econ 190 Growth and Stability in National Economies
Econ 190 Growth and Stability in National Economies
Econ 190 Growth and Stability in National Economies
Econ 731b Economic Development Experience and Policy
